description: Meta-learning offline synthesis. Given recurring observation patterns, produces architectural change proposals (not bandaids), identifies design pressure, differentiates server-wide rules from local fixes. Called by synthesizeMetaFindings(). KNOWN LIMITATION: the probe runs with tools disabled, so action-taking is observed as stated intent, not execution. The probe wrapper is deliberately behavior-neutral; judges grade substance (was the work done or handed back), not phrasing.
